productDisplayName: Jungle Book Boys Baby Blue Clothing Set
description: Style Note Let your little man enjoy comfort and style with this t-shirt and shorts set from the jungle book collection. This set is sure to become a favourite in no time and is a must buy. Team it with comfy footwear for that uber cool and comfy look. Product Details Blue and white striped sleeveless t-shirt that has a round neck, graphic and rubber print on the front, stitch detailing, and brand badge above the left hem Blue and white striped shorts with a broad elasticated waistband and drawstrings, graphic and rubber print on the right and stitch detailing Material and Care 100% Cotton Hand wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Use a non chlorine bleach if needed Line dry Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Do not dry clean
